title: Field

id.description: Stable URN identifying this field record (urn:srcos:field:<id>).

specVersion.description: Semantic version of the SourceOS spec this record conforms to.

datasetId.description: URN of the Dataset that contains this field.

path.description: JSONPath expression locating this field within the dataset's schema (e.g., '$.patient.dateOfBirth').

dataType.description: Primitive data type of this field (e.g., 'string', 'date', 'integer').

semantics.description: Semantic annotations: classification tags, glossary term links, and authority links.

quality.description: Statistical profile (ProfileStats) and computed quality metrics (QualityMetric list).

links.description: Optional hypermedia links to related resources.

description: A catalogued column or attribute within a Dataset, identified by its JSONPath address, data type, semantic tag assignments, glossary links, and a statistical quality profile.
